overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in colorful streetwear navigating a futuristic urban intersection at dusk. The character waits for traffic, crosses a multi-lane street, and walks along a neon-lit sidewalk beneath elevated highways in Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with neon signage

events.description: character begins walking from the corner toward the crosswalk
pedestrian walks past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing at the intersection corner observing traffic, then walking toward the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated NOCHI signage on the facade
red elevated roadway structure spanning across the intersection
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
glowing advertisements and holographic signage on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a futuristic urban intersection during sunset, with the NOCHI building visible ahead. The elevated highway spans the background while futuristic cars drive through the intersection. The character begins walking toward the crosswalk as pedestrians pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: character turns to face down the street, shifting view from open intersection to street canyon
black sports car passes close in front of the character at the crosswalk
character begins crossing the street after the car passes

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk edge for traffic to clear, then stepping onto the crosswalk to cross

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car driving past the crosswalk, narrowly missing the character

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge with red structural elements spanning the street
tall pole with traffic signals and hanging neon decorations

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the edge of a crosswalk beneath the elevated highway, watching traffic. A black sports car passes close by, creating a near-miss situation. The character then begins crossing the street as the camera turns to follow the new direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: character enters the covered area beneath the elevated highway, lighting shifts to artificial neon
character turns slightly while walking along the sidewalk to navigate around a pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing neon-lit storefronts and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: shops with bright pink and teal neon lighting and illuminated signage
large structural columns holding up the elevated highway above
black and yellow bollards separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, entering a more enclosed space dominated by artificial neon lighting. Pink and teal neon signs illuminate storefronts on the right while traffic barriers line the left. The elevated highway structure looms directly overhead, creating an urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunset-lit urban intersection into the enclosed, neon-drenched corridors of a futuristic city. It begins with the character standing before the NOCHI building as futuristic cars flow beneath an elevated highway, moving forward through a crowd of pedestrians toward the street. As the character reaches the edge of the crosswalk, a black sports car streaks past in a near-miss before the camera pivots to follow the character crossing the multi-lane road. The scene then shifts from the fading natural light of dusk into a dense urban canyon, where the camera tracks the character along a sidewalk beneath the looming highway structure. Finally, the environment transforms into a vibrant artificial landscape dominated by pink and teal neon signs and metallic traffic barriers.
